paper.title: Retrieval Trace Scientist for Auto Research Source Recovery

claims.text: The trace scientist clusters 48 failed source-recovery attempts into 6 recurring failure modes.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The ranked repair plan improves source recovery from 31% to 54% on the saved 48-item fixture.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The method has not been tested on live post-deadline news queries.
claims.rationale: The claim is prospective, missing a direct run, or tied to an explicit limitation.

evidence.text: The trace audit table lists 48 failed source-recovery attempts and groups them into 6 recurring failure modes.
The replay run recovers 26 of 48 items after ranked repair queries, compared with 15 of 48 items in the baseline run.
The limitation note says live post-deadline news queries have not been tested.

limitations.text: The limitation note says live post-deadline news queries have not been tested.
The method has not been tested on live post-deadline news queries.
